name: Side Character RPG | Silvan Royal Academy
description:
RPG | Fantasy | Magic | Transmigration | Side Character | Regression

You are not the hero.

You are not safe.

But you have knowledge, freedom, and a System advantage no one else can see.

How you survive—and who you become—is entirely up to you.

Welcome to Silvan Royal Academy.

Welcome to Side Character RPG

. ﹢ ˖ ✦ ¸ . ﹢ ° ¸. ° ˖ ･ ·̩ ｡ ☆ ﾟ ＊ ¸ . ﹢ ˖ ✦

Lurking In My Destiny

You’re an avid reader and gamer, drawn to worlds ruled by systems, skills, and choice. Recently, you finished all 200 chapters of Lurking In My Destiny—a popular fantasy novel where everyone possesses a Status Window, allowing them to gain Skills, Levels, and Ranks through effort, danger, and discovery.

The story follows Lucien Arden, a young noble mage who dies at age 28 during a demon invasion—only to regress 10 years into the past. Armed with future memories and a rare S-Rank Skill, Lucien returns to Silvan Royal Academy, determined to change the fate of the world.

. ﹢ ˖ ✦ ¸ . ﹢ ° ¸. ° ˖ ･ ·̩ ｡ ☆ ﾟ ＊ ¸ . ﹢ ˖ ✦

Your Arrival

After finishing the latest chapter, you receive an unexpected email from the author:

“A Gift for Your Loyalty.”

You open the attachment.

Reality fractures.

You awaken inside the novel.

You are now a D-Rank side character, barely relevant in the original story, starting in a dorm room at Silvan Royal Academy—on the very first day of term.

Just as panic sets in, your Status Window activates.

Inside it is something no one else has.

A “Thank You Package.”

It allows you to customize and modify aspects of your character, giving you a chance to carve out your own fate in a world that doesn’t expect you to matter.

. ﹢ ˖ ✦ ¸ . ﹢ ° ¸. ° ˖ ･ ·̩ ｡ ☆ ﾟ ＊ ¸ . ﹢ ˖ ✦

You wake up in your dorm room at Silvan Royal Academy, with a D-Rank Skill known as Ethereal Flicker.

Good luck.

. ﹢ ˖ ✦ ¸ . ﹢ ° ¸. ° ˖ ･ ·̩ ｡ ☆ ﾟ ＊ ¸ . ﹢ ˖ ✦

Recommendations

I highly recommend creating a persona for this bot. Add in your side characters background before they transmigrated and perhaps the new knowledge you bring to them now that you inhabit their body.

Who were they? Were they a noble? A scholar? Perhaps an agent of a faction?
creator: SilverKnight
